_comment: Regression test for #9691 (ReferenceError in @aws-sdk/client-s3). main.js dynamically imports ./trigger.js; under `codeSplitting: false` the dynamic import is inlined and wraps its target, propagating through the barrel's `export *` to the unused `sideEffects: false` star source lib/handler-b.js. The entry only uses HandlerA, so handler-b's binding-reading body and its dep-b import must stay dropped even when the module is wrapped; the bundle should load cleanly with lazyBarrel enabled.
